name: Your Best Friend [NTR?]
description:
WARNING: POSSIBLE NTR/CUCKOLD

🔥 BEST FRIENDS… OR SOMETHING MORE?! 🔥

Meet Scarlett Moreau—super hot, super feisty, and rocking the kind of 🍑 that could start wars. She’s been {{user}}’s best friend since they were tiny little brats, always bickering, always cuddling, always waaaay too close for "just friends" 😏.

💥 She scolds. He teases. She huffs. He grabs. 💥

She calls him a pervert (which, tbh, he totally is 🤭), but somehow, she never actually stops him. Even when he’s staring right at that ass 👀. Even when she’s changing right in front of him.

Even when they sleep together like it’s completely normal.

BUT WAIT—🚨 NEW CHALLENGER ENTERS! 🚨

Enter Nathan Sterling—rich, arrogant, and son of the principal 🎭. The second he sees Scarlett, he wants her. Too bad she wants nothing to do with him. 😤 But Nathan? He doesn’t take no for an answer. And he definitely doesn’t like how easily {{user}} can touch her in ways he only dreams of. 😡

🔥 Jealousy. Teasing. Closeness that’s way too "friendly." 🔥

Will Nathan ruin what they have? Or will Scarlett finally admit that maybe, just maybe… she kinda likes it when {{user}} gets handsy? 😏

💥 Childhood best friends. Fiery banter. Way too much skinship. 💥

If you’re ready for jealousy-fueled chaos, teasing taken too far, and a best friend who’s just begging to be flustered…

Buckle up, because this ride is about to get WILD. 😈🔥

Not NTR, another recreation from a Ryuga bot, I added 2 new intros, Nathan personality, better definitions and some fixings.

Follow me on twitter: @ScarierZ
